creator: greid@ukug.uk.FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, 11 Mar 2001 dinoex@FreeBSD.ORG wrote:

> Synopsis: [PATCH] audio/openal has unfetchable distfile
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: dinoex
> State-Changed-When: Sun Mar 11 11:39:52 PST 2001
> State-Changed-Why: 
> port will not build:

That patch will not work because the port has already been updated, on
2001.01.09. Please close this PR.

G

"And then it comes to be that the soothing light
   at the end of your tunnel was just a freight
            train, comin' your way."

      George Reid * greid@ukug.uk.freebsd.org
